name: Sullivan Country Club
about: Sullivan Country Club is a 9-hole course in Central Illinois that has been established for over 100 years and remains a highly maintained course for all players. The clubhouse was newly renovated in 2023 and houses a pro shop, bar & grill, a golf simulator room, and a gaming room. The venue features a pool, which is currently closed for the season, and offers a comfortable area with chairs, umbrellas, and tables, including a wading pool for children. It operates a golf simulator with Trackman technology and is available for booking online.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman technology for accurate ball and club data analysis
Convenient online booking system for simulator sessions
All-in-one venue combining both outdoor and indoor golf experiences
Private and welcoming atmosphere within a community club setting
Available for corporate events and group bookings

food_and_drink.notes: Kitchen and Bar & Grill available during business hours with oven items available at all times. Food availability on other days and times is dependent on staff availability.
Full bar service available in the clubhouse bar.

simulator_hardware.notes: Trackman simulator is used for indoor golf sessions with online booking available.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While not explicitly stated, it is standard practice for players to bring their own clubs when using a golf simulator.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has an on-site kitchen and bar & grill available during business hours. External food and drink policies are not specified.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The time required to play 18 holes on the simulator is not specified in the provided content.

faq.question: Is the simulator facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly, featuring a pool with a wading pool for younger children and is listed as family-friendly in its tags.
